artifact_overview_desc: Live status, role, and recent activity.
settings_archetypeHint: Pick how this agent is used — it tailors which settings show below.
archetype_autonomousDesc: Runs on a trigger or schedule
studio_emptyDescription: Configure your settings and hit Generate
marketplace_agentsSubtitle: Browse and install pre-built AI agents
marketplace_syncPrompt: Sync from GitHub to populate the marketplace
reliability_connectToView: Connect to a server to view reliability data
settings_logoDescription: Choose a logo that represents your workspace. This will update the favicon and all site branding.
roles_duplicateDescription: Starts as a copy of {source} — edit its permissions after creating it.
roles_deleteInUse: Remove this role from {count} member(s) before deleting it
roles_confirmDelete: Delete this custom role? This cannot be undone.
users_cannotRemoveLastOwner: Cannot remove the organization's last owner
users_confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove this user?
workshop_emptyHint: Drag an agent from the palette on the left onto the canvas to bring the workspace to life.
workshop_banterHintOn: Idle agents auto-chat. Click to pause.
workshop_banterHintOff: Idle auto-chat is paused. Click to enable.
workshop_gatewayOffline: Server offline — conversations and tasks are paused
gateway_shutdownMessage: The server has shut down unexpectedly.
welcome_subtitle: Your central command for managing AI agents. Connect to a server, create agents, and orchestrate your AI workforce.
welcome_addHost: Add a host to get started
welcome_tip: Tip: Use the sidebar to quickly switch between agents
marketplace_agentsListSearchPlaceholder: Search agents by name, role, or skill…
marketplace_agentsListEmptyHint: Try adjusting your filters or search terms
marketplace_agentsListEmptySync: The marketplace is empty. Refresh the page to sync agents.
marketplace_agentDetailNotFoundHint: This agent may have been removed or doesn't exist.
marketplace_wizardStep1Subtitle: Define their professional role and domain.
marketplace_wizardStep1RolePlaceholder: e.g. DevOps Engineer, UX Designer, Growth Marketer
marketplace_wizardStep2Subtitle: Give them a name and shape their personality.
marketplace_wizardStep3Body: Claude will write {name}'s full identity — SOUL, IDENTITY, USER, CONTEXT, and SKILLS documents.
marketplace_wizardStep4Hint: Looks good? Continue to export and push to GitHub.
marketplace_wizardStep5Subtitle: Download the agent files, add them to the minions repo, then sync.
chat_viewingSession: Viewing session — switch to main to chat
skills_description: Knowledge & behavior modules — coding styles, domain expertise, workflows.
skills_tooltip:
Skills are knowledge modules that shape how the agent thinks and responds.

DO: Enable skills that match the agent's domain expertise.
DON'T: Overload with conflicting skills — quality over quantity.
tools_description: Executable functions the agent can call — file I/O, search, code execution.
tools_tooltip:
Tools are executable capabilities the agent can invoke during tasks.

DO: Enable tools the agent needs for its role.
DON'T: Enable all tools — more tools = slower, noisier context.
sessions_selectToView: Select a session to view transcript
config_inheritsDefaults: Fields inherit from agents.defaults unless overridden here.
inbox_dropFiles: Drop files here or click to browse
rulebook_subtitle: Standing instructions injected into all agent prompts
rulebook_agentChatsDesc: Allow agents to converse with each other
rulebook_crossWorkspaceChatsDesc: When off, conversations are fully isolated to this workspace
rulebook_placeholder: Write standing instructions for all agents…
agentGroup_deleteConfirm: Delete this group? Agents won't be removed.
invite_alreadyAccepted: This invitation has already been accepted
invite_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
myAgent_presetProfessionalPreview: Clear, structured responses with a focus on accuracy and efficiency.
myAgent_presetCasualPreview: Friendly and conversational, like chatting with a helpful friend.
myAgent_presetCreativePreview: Imaginative and expressive, with a flair for creative solutions.
myAgent_presetTechnicalPreview: Precise and detail-oriented, with deep technical explanations.
myAgent_connectDesc: Your personal agent needs a server connection to finish setup. Add a host to get started.
myAgent_settingUpDesc: Your personal agent is being created. This usually takes a few seconds.
myAgent_creatingWorkspaceDesc: Almost ready. Setting up your agent workspace.
myAgent_setupFailedDesc: It will retry automatically. If this persists, contact your admin.
myAgent_welcomeDesc: Pick a personality to get started, or just say hello in any channel.
myAgent_displayNameNotReady: Connect to the server to edit your display name.
myAgent_displayNameSaveFailed: Couldn't save display name. Try again.
myAgent_personalityPlaceholder: Describe your agent's personality, tone, and style...
myAgent_noChannelsDesc: Your admin can link messaging channels to your agent.
myAgent_noActivity: No activity yet. Send your first message to get started. Try one of the prompts below.
myAgent_previewPrompt: This is a preview prompt. Connect to a server to start chatting with your agent.
myAgent_noAgentDesc: Your personal agent will be created automatically.
flow_pluginManaged: Managed by the {plugin} plugin — cannot be deleted
marketplace_pluginsSubtitle: Find and install plugins that extend Minion Hub
config_unsavedChangesPrompt: You have unsaved changes. What would you like to do?
config_disconnectedAutoSave: Changes will be saved automatically when reconnected.
config_connectHint: Connect via the System tab or select a host from the topbar
config_noTabSettingsHint: This server may not expose settings for this category
hosts_noServersHint: Add a server to get started.
hosts_deleteConfirm: Delete server "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
backup_connectToManage: Connect to a host to manage backups
backup_confirmRestoreBody: This will overwrite the current .minion directory on the server with the snapshot from {date} and restart the server service.
crt_subtitle: Customize phosphor & screen effects. Changes apply on save.
crt_bloomHalation: Wide halation corona around all text
provision_apiKeyHint: Stored encrypted. Leave blank to keep existing key.
provision_noOutput: No output yet. Run provisioning to see logs here.
reliability_noLlmData: No LLM usage data in selected range
capabilities_mcp_systemDesc: In-house MCP servers hosted by your gateway.
capabilities_mcp_gatewayDesc: Aggregated origin exposing gateway methods and plugin tools.
capabilities_mcp_disconnected: Connect to a gateway to view its MCP servers.
workshop_pickConversation: Pick a conversation from the list
workshop_taskPromptHint: Leave blank to use a default prompt · Cmd/Ctrl+Enter
session_noToolCalls: No tool calls in this session
channel_managedByGateway: Managed by server — credentials are read-only.
channel_saveFirstThenQr: Save the channel first, then pair via QR code.
channel_accountsSubtitle: Register Discord, WhatsApp, and Telegram accounts for this server.
channel_modeBoundHint: Inbound messages are routed to an agent that can reply.
channel_modeReceiveOnlyHint: Inbound messages are recorded only — no agent replies.
channel_behaviorHint: Receive-only never replies. Allowlist replies only to listed senders. Open replies to anyone.
channel_behaviorAllowlistLabel: Allowed senders (one per line, E.164 e.g. +51999999999)
channel_selectServer: Select a server from the topbar to manage channels.
channel_scanQrInstruction: Scan the QR code with WhatsApp to link this channel.
channel_waitingQr: Waiting for QR code from server...
channel_transportOffTooltip: Transport is off — enable above to start this account.
channel_markOnlineHint: Applying this briefly reconnects ALL WhatsApp accounts (the server hot-restarts the WhatsApp channel to apply it).
channel_markOnlineConfirm: This will briefly reconnect ALL WhatsApp accounts. Continue?
kg_noMemoryObjectsHint: Send messages to the agent to build its knowledge graph.
kg_clickNodeToInspect: Click a node to inspect it
prompt_noReport: No prompt report available for this agent yet.
prompt_sendMessage: Send a message to generate the system prompt.
prompt_bootstrapDesc: Workspace files injected at prompt start.
prompt_parametersDesc: Model and environment configuration for this agent session.
prompt_skillsDesc: Skill blocks injected into the system prompt.
prompt_sandboxDesc: Sandbox isolation configuration for this agent.
prompt_memoryBody1: Before each turn, the server queries the knowledge graph for entity mentions relevant to the user's message.
prompt_memoryBody2: Retrieved facts are injected as context — max ~500 tokens per turn. This is dynamic and not captured in the static report above.
prompt_ttsBody1: If tts is configured for this agent, the server injects formatting instructions asking the model to produce speech-friendly output (avoid markdown, keep responses concise).
prompt_ttsBody2: This hint is config-dependent and not visible in the static report.
prompt_postTurnDesc: Knowledge graph extraction after each response.
prompt_postTurnBody1: After each assistant response, the server runs an extraction pass to identify facts, entities, and relationships mentioned in the turn.
prompt_postTurnBody2: Extracted facts are stored to the knowledge graph and become available as memory context in future turns. This process happens asynchronously and is not captured in the static report.
settings_bindingsDesc: Channel and routing bindings that reference this agent.
settings_modules_subtitle: Enable or disable hub modules for your organisation
dream_noActivityDesc: Dreams run automatically after sessions end. They consolidate daily notes into long-term memory when enough activity has accumulated.
subagent_selectToView: Select a subagent to view details
subagent_noneDesc: Subagents are autonomous child sessions that agents spawn to handle subtasks. They appear here when the agent uses sessions_spawn. Ensure maxSpawnDepth is at least 1 in your server config.
builder_gatewayToolsDesc: Server tools and custom tool scripts appear here
builder_noGatewayToolsDesc: Connect to a server to see server tools, or create custom tool scripts
builder_noSkillsDesc: Create your first skill to extend agent capabilities
builder_noAgentsDesc: Build a custom agent with its own personality and tools
builder_dagEmptyHint: Add chapters to build the execution flow
builder_guidePlaceholder: Search the web for..., Extract key data...
builder_inputExpectationsHint: What data does this chapter receive?
builder_successCriteriaHint: What must be true when this completes?
builder_successPlaceholder: e.g. All URLs fetched, Output has 3+ data points
builder_nameTooShort: Name must be at least 3 characters
builder_noCapabilities: No capabilities available. Add skills or tools to the server first.
builder_testPromptPlaceholder: Enter a sample user message to test this skill...
builder_addChaptersFirst: Add chapters before running a test
builder_noChaptersDefined: No chapters defined. Add chapters to preview the execution path.
builder_toolPoolEmpty: Tools appear here as you build chapters
builder_firstVisitTitle: Describe your skill to get started
builder_firstVisitDesc: Write a description in the sidebar, then use AI to generate your chapter pipeline — or add chapters manually.
builder_deleteChapterDesc: This chapter and its configuration will be permanently removed.
builder_conditionHelper: Binary yes/no question the agent evaluates at runtime
builder_systemPromptHelper: Define the agent's personality, role, and behavioral guidelines
builder_systemPromptPlaceholder: You are a helpful assistant that...
builder_dropSkillHint: Drop a skill here or click to browse
prompt_noReportHint: Click Test to generate a preview, or send a message to populate from a live session.
provision_phaseUserCreationDesc: Create minion user and directory structure
config_unsavedPreserved: You had unsaved local changes that were preserved
config_reloadDialog:
Server config was reloaded after restart. You had unsaved changes.

Click OK to keep your changes, or Cancel to use server values.
config_connectionLost: Connection lost. Your changes were not saved.
builder_publishFailedDesc: Cannot publish — unsaved changes could not be saved. Please try again.
builder_publishError: Could not reach server. Please try again.
channelWizard_discordHint: Find the token in the Discord Developer Portal → your bot → Reset Token.
channelWizard_whatsappHint: Open WhatsApp on your phone → Settings → Linked Devices → Link a Device.
easel_emptyHint: Drop images, paste, or use the toolbar. Scroll to zoom, drag to pan.
note_addNoteTitle: New note  ·  type / inside to embed a to-do or easel
note_emptyState: Capture a thought or a checklist. Tap + to start.
email_couldntLoadBody: Couldn't load the message body. Open in Gmail to read the full email.
chat_addNoteOrSend: Add a note, or just send the context…
tx_notSupported: Live transcription is not supported in this browser.
tx_setOpenaiApiKey: Set OPENAI_API_KEY on the hub to transcribe system audio.
tx_noTabAudio: No tab audio shared — pick a tab and enable "Share tab audio".
feed_connectGateway: Connect a server to see your feed.
feed_quiet: Quiet so far today. As you exchange messages with your agents, they'll surface here.
flowcfg_ruleModeTip: Match by text rule (contains / equals / regex)
flowcfg_llmModeTip: Classify by LLM using each branch's rubric
flowcfg_hybridModeTip: Rule fast-path first, then LLM rubric fallback
flowcfg_branchDescriptionPlaceholder: when to choose this branch (rubric / conditions)
flowcfg_chooseChannelToAdd: Choose a channel to add destinations.
flowcfg_pickLinkedUser: Pick a user who linked this channel to their account
flowcfg_readActionDesc: Read runs a SELECT (read-only) and returns the rows as JSON.
flowcfg_writeActionDesc: Create / Update / Delete run a write statement and return the change count.
flowcfg_dbPathConfined: Confined to the ledger or a file under the server state dir.
flowcfg_consumeMarkerDesc: Stamp a column on the rows this read returns, so each run drains only new rows (e.g. last_checked on the ledger). Identifiers are allow-listed.
flowcfg_eventAppliesToSources: The event applies to every source below — add another trigger node for a different event.
flowcfg_noSourcesDesc: No sources — this trigger fires on every channel. Add one to scope it to a specific channel / account.
flowcfg_sendOutputBack: Send the flow's final output back to the originating chat.
flowcfg_setReactionDesc: Set on the message that triggered this flow (e.g. mark a complaint received → handled).
flowcfg_couldntLoadFlows: Couldn't load flows — type is saved, but pick again once flows load.
flowcfg_noOtherFlows: No other flows yet. Create one first, then reference it here.
flowcfg_subflowRunsDesc: Runs the chosen flow with this node's input; its final output continues downstream.
flowcfg_scheduleDesc: The flow fires on this interval once activated. A scheduled run has no inbound message — fetch what you need inside the flow (e.g. a DB Query node).
flowcfg_atTimeDesc: Fire at or after this local time on its scheduled day.
flowcfg_filePathDesc: Confined to the server's flow-files dir. {date} → YYYY-MM-DD. Writes the upstream message content.
flow_masterFlowDesc: Read-only reference diagram of a standard server behavior
flownode_noBranchesYetAddInConfigure: No branches yet — add them in Configure.
flownode_doubleClickPickChannelDestinati: Double-click to pick a channel & destinations
flownode_templatePlaceholder: Template — use {input} for the upstream output
flownode_noRunsYetHitTestRun: No runs yet — hit Test Run to record one.
usersui_rolesDescription: Group permissions and pages members can see. Built-in roles are read-only.
usersui_modulesHelpText: Which sections this role can see
usersui_selectRoleOrCreate: Select a role to edit, or create a new one.
usersui_imageLimitNote: PNG, JPG or GIF, up to 5 MB
usersui_configuredOnGateway: This channel is configured on the server.
usersui_connectGatewayToLinkChannels: Connect to a server to link more channels.
workforce_orgChartInfo: {count} agents · drag to pan · scroll to zoom
floatingAssistant_greeting: Ask anything about the hub. I'll see what you're viewing and can run tools and skills your personal agent has enabled.
provisionForm_initialPromptPlaceholder: First instruction sent to the agent on boot…
shellsPage_subtitle: Long-lived exe.dev VMs, each hosting one autonomous agent with full admin.
shellsPage_emptyDescription: Spin one up to get started. Each shell gets its own exe.dev VM.
shellDetail_destroyConfirm: Permanently destroy {name}? This deletes the VM and all backups.
dynamicSecretGroup_noInstances: No instances yet. Add accounts in the {plugin} plugin to create entries here.
pluginsPage_subtitle: Plugins that ship a UI appear here. Their configuration is owned by the plugin itself.
pluginsPage_restartMessage: Then restart the server and click Retry.
pluginsPage_restartRequired: Server restart required for the change to take effect.
pluginsPage_noHost: No active host. Pick one in the host switcher to load this plugin.
pluginsPage_emptyDescription: Plugins extend the hub with new pages, widgets, and integrations. Browse the marketplace to find one.
reliability_noActivityYetHint: No memory writes, heartbeats or tool calls in this range yet — they accrue as agents act.
reliability_activityTelemetryRequired: Memory writes, heartbeats and tool calls appear here once the server is emitting them (requires the activity-telemetry server build).
reliability_readsNoWrites: {count} read(s), no writes — memory is being recalled but not curated.
reliability_noMemoryActivity: No memory activity in range — agents aren't reading or writing memory.
reliability_noHeartbeats: No heartbeats recorded — proactive check-ins may be disabled or not firing.
misc_helpsAgentUnderstandYou: This helps your agent understand who you are and how to work with you.
misc_howShouldAgentCallYou: How should your agent call you?
misc_contextPlaceholder: I run a clinic and multiple businesses. I need help with scheduling, client follow-ups, financial tracking...
misc_nameResonates: This is the entity that will work for you. Give it a name that resonates.
misc_shapesThinking: This shapes how your agent thinks and responds.
misc_notEnoughMemories: Not enough embedded memories to plot yet.
misc_noMemoriesSelected: No memories in the selected categories.
misc_tickSectionsInspect: Tick one or more sections in the tree above to inspect their content.
misc_selectAgentPreview: Select an agent to preview the assembled prompt.
misc_invitedToJoinOrg: You've been invited to join {orgName} as {role}.
misc_requestAccessInstructions: Your account {email} isn't a member of any organization yet. Submit a request and the admin will review it.
misc_messagePlaceholder: Tell the admin who you are and why you need access...
awaken_nameSubtitle: This is the entity that will work for you. Give it a name that resonates.
awaken_natureSubtitle: This shapes how your agent thinks and responds.
memory_notEnough: Not enough embedded memories to plot yet.
memory_noCategories: No memories in the selected categories.
join_invitedToJoin: You've been invited to join {org} as {role}.
join_notMemberSubtitle: Your account {email} isn't a member of any organization yet. Submit a request and the admin will review it.
join_messagePlaceholder: Tell the admin who you are and why you need access…
prompt_selectAgentToPreview: Select an agent to preview the assembled prompt.
prose_noWorkspaceFiles: No workspace files embedded by this section.
prose_workspaceFilesInfo: These files are embedded verbatim into the prompt by this section. To edit them, use your agent's file tools or workspace editor — they're agent-owned content, not prompt-template prose.
prose_fileChangedTitle: File changed since you opened it
prose_fileChangedDesc: Another save (from another operator or external edit) landed before yours. Your unsaved edits are preserved — choose how to proceed.
prose_keepMyChanges: Keep my changes (overwrite on next save)
prose_notMigrated: This section hasn't been migrated to editable prose yet.
prose_migrationNote: Pure-prose sections will become editable in the D-0f-2 sweep. Sections with conditional rendering logic (e.g. tool-availability branches) stay rendered at runtime.
prose_initFromDefault: Initialize from the section default to start editing.
prose_noDefaultTemplate: This variant has no default template — type below to create one.
ctx_cacheableShare: Share of the prompt that is cacheable
sel_deleteConfirm: Delete section "{id}"? This cannot be undone.
sel_tickSections: Tick one or more sections in the tree above to inspect their content.
step_subtitle: This helps your agent understand who you are and how to work with you.
step_namePlaceholder: How should your agent call you?
step_contextPlaceholder: I run a clinic and multiple businesses. I need help with scheduling, client follow-ups, financial tracking...
a11y0_dailySpendTrend: Daily spend over the last 14 days
crm_empty_body: Contacts appear here once people message your registered channels. Hit Sync now to harvest them from the message ledger.
crm_reserved_only: Reserved — paid the deposit, no purchase yet
crm_awaiting_hint: Last message is inbound — we owe a reply
crm_forget_confirm: Forget this contact? This permanently deletes the CRM record (the message ledger is unaffected).
crm_hygiene_subtitle: Standardize names and merge duplicate contacts
crm_standardize_hint: Rule-based proposals strip emoji, unwrap brackets and fix casing. Run AI review to decode symbols, infer spaces in run-together names, and flag non-names — then apply.
crm_duplicates_hint: Grouped by identical DNI or matching name, most confident first. Check each contact's numbers before merging — a shared name alone doesn't mean it's the same person.
crm_dup_weak_warn: Members have different contact numbers — likely different people. Confirm before merging.
crm_dup_merge_summary: {count} contact(s) will merge into the primary, then be deleted.
crm_blanks_hint: Blank, single-character or emoji-only contacts — use the phone, DNI and channel handles to identify them, type a real name, then apply.
crm_merge_confirm: Merge {count} contact(s) into "{name}"? This deletes the others and folds their identities, history and tags into the survivor.
crm_channels_subtitle: Add the connected accounts you want feeding the CRM. Paused accounts are skipped when harvesting new contacts.
crm_channels_none: No connected accounts are feeding the CRM yet. Contacts appear once people message your registered accounts.
crm_accounts_none_added: No accounts added yet. Add a linked account to start feeding the CRM.
crm_accounts_available_none: All linked accounts are already added.
shared_inboxesSubtitle: Business accounts you can add to your feed (emails & events).
shared_staleWrite: Record was changed by someone else — refreshed
shared_accountsDesc: Mark a business account (e.g. a shared inbox) as shared, then expose its identities so org members can opt them into their own feed.
crm_notes_empty: No notes yet — capture the first one.
dash_layout_save_default_hint: Pin this layout as the default for everyone who hasn't customized theirs
crm_insights_no_words: No client words in this range yet.
crm_wins_analysis_wins: What worked — and how to repeat it
crm_wins_analysis_hint: Rebuild to generate an AI breakdown of these wins.
crm_insights_sentiment_none: No sentiment scored yet — it fills in as messages arrive.
crm_wins_thin: Conversations are short — matches improve as chats accumulate.
crm_similar_none: No similar wins yet — the learning index is still small.
crm_dash_total_help: All contacts harvested from your connected channels.
crm_dash_new_help: First seen within the last 30 days.
crm_stage_help_New: Just arrived — little or no message history yet.
crm_stage_help_Engaged: Two-way conversation within the last 14 days.
crm_stage_help_Active: Contacted in the last 30 days with 10+ messages.
crm_dash_temperature_help: By RFM score — hot ≥ 75, warm 50–74, cold < 50.
crm_dash_range_hint: Filters contacts by acquisition date. Revenue is all-time.
crm_resp_help: Contacts whose last message is inbound (we owe a reply).
crm_dash_conversion_help: Of leads acquired in the selected range: how many booked a reservation, then bought a procedure.
crm_funnel_by_billing: Advanced by billing — real purchase on record.
crm_funnel_none: No funnel stage yet — no first contact recorded.
crm_ai_criteria_ph: Describe who qualifies — e.g. "customers who asked about Botox or fillers"
crm_ai_criteria_hint: An AI agent reads each contact's messages and applies this tag to those who match.
crm_ai_desc_required: Add a description of who qualifies.
fin_invoices_no_match: No invoices match the current filters.
fin_connector_credentials_hint: Credentials set — leave blank to keep
fin_sync_description: Trigger a manual sync to pull the latest invoices from the provider.
sched_module_scheduling_desc: Resource calendars, booking links, and team capacity
sched_dashboard_subtitle: Bookings, team capacity and revenue at a glance
sched_utilization_subtitle: Booked vs available hours per team member
sched_revenue_subtitle: Linked finance revenue from booked customers
sched_team_subtitle: Your organization's people and their calendars
sched_team_no_members: No members in this organization yet.
sched_et_customSchedule: Use a custom schedule for this service
sched_et_customSchedule_help: When off, the service is offered whenever its assigned team is available. When on, slots must also fall inside these weekly windows (still requires an assigned member to be free).
sched_link_team_note: Each service uses its own assigned team — set it on the Services page.
sched_book_no_slots: No times available — try another day.
sched_book_unavailable: That time is no longer available. Please pick another.
sched_book_done_note: We’ve saved your appointment details and sent you a confirmation.
sched_book_done_note_pending: We’ve received your request and will confirm it shortly.
sched_empty_resources: No team members yet. Add one to start scheduling.
sched_empty_eventTypes: No services yet. Add a bookable service.
sched_rem_autonomy: Notifications are sent automatically — a confirmation when a booking is made, then reminders before the appointment — on the channels you choose.
sched_rem_enabled_desc: When off, nothing is sent. Off by default until at least one channel is set.
sched_rem_account_help: Gateway account id to send from. Leave blank to use the default WhatsApp account.
sched_rem_personalize_desc: Rewrite each message warmly with AI (falls back to a template).
sched_rem_needs_account: Pick at least one channel and enable notifications to start sending.
sched_rem_channels_help: Pick which linked channels send notifications. You can set more than one.
sched_rem_no_channels: No linked channels found. Link a channel first.
sched_rem_confirmation_note: Sent when a booking is made; includes the appointment summary.
sched_rem_infer_on: AI infers whether the customer confirms or cancels from their replies — even indirect ones.
sched_rem_infer_off: The confirmation asks the customer to reply SÍ/NO; we match the keyword in their replies.
sysagent_reminders_desc: Sends WhatsApp confirmation and pre-appointment reminders automatically.
sysagent_triage_desc: Classifies every inbound message and routes complaints to your team.
artifact_triage_desc: Alert counts and recent complaints from the triage kernel.
sysagent_builder_desc: Generates custom dashboards on request from your agents' data.
flow_copilot_proposed: Proposed changes — review on the canvas.
flow_copilot_invalid: Heads up: the proposal has validation warnings.
autonomous_page_subtitle: Triggered, self-running automations — no chat, just a job.
autonomous_workforce_section_desc: Event-driven agents from the Workforce module — each acts autonomously on issue events.
autonomous_empty: No autonomous agents yet. Enable a module (like Scheduling) to add one.
artifact_create_html_hint: Self-contained HTML. Use the artifact bridge for live data.
artifact_gen_prompt_ph: e.g. a card showing reminders sent vs failed this month
workshop_exp_manage_empty_warning: No models selected — non-admins will see no models.
workshop_exp_prompt_placeholder: Prompt to send to every selected model…
workshop_exp_run_not_persisted: Run not persisted — ranking can't be saved.
workshop_exp_leaderboard_desc: Win-rate from your comparison rankings, plus latency & cost from comparison runs.
workshop_exp_leaderboard_empty: No comparison data yet — run a comparison and rank the outputs.
workshop_exp_strip_empty: No rankings yet — rank a comparison to build the leaderboard.
workshop_exp_problem_placeholder: The problem for the panel to solve…
no_permission: You don't have permission for this.
brains_page_subtitle: Org-scoped knowledge bases agents and teammates can search.
brains_empty_desc: Create a brain to give agents and teammates a searchable knowledge base.
brains_search_empty: No results yet — try a search.
brains_access_empty: No extra access grants — org visibility governs read access.
brains_delete_confirm: Delete this brain? This removes all its documents and chunks.
brains_no_access: You don't have write access to this brain.
stock_overview_subtitle: Stock levels, valuation, and recent movements.
stock_empty_body: Add items and warehouses to start tracking stock.
stock_items_subtitle: Item catalog — codes, units, reorder thresholds.
stock_bins_empty: No stock recorded for this item.
stock_warehouse_cycle_error: That would create a cycle in the warehouse tree.
stock_step_type_hint: Choose what kind of stock movement this entry records.
stock_lines_empty: Add at least one line to continue.
stock_confirm_cancel_body: This reverses its stock movement with new ledger rows — the original entry is kept for the record, never deleted.
